title: Manang trekking lodge
prompt: A booking site for a family-run trekking lodge in Manang, Nepal — warm, credible, not a tourism cliché. Travelers should see rooms, seasonal availability, and how to reach the lodge.

direction.name: The Manang Ledger
direction.thesis: A warm, authoritative mountain field journal where expressive serif typography, precise route notes, and a restrained paper-and-ink palette make booking feel personal and dependable.
direction.signature: A continuous rust-red season line runs through the page, linking the lodge story, room availability, and the traveler’s route to Manang as one editorial journey.
